summary: Ping+HTTP Monitoring Feature - All tests passed. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified working. Connector ONLINE with v1.7.1, update-info shows v1.7.2.

console_warnings.message: React setState warning in LoginPage during render - minor issue, does not affect functionality
Recharts chart width/height warning during initial render
WebSocket connection to wss://...ws/alerts failed - expected in test environment

backend_api_tests: GET /api/connector/status returns connector list (IFIXITGESTSRV3 ONLINE v1.7.1)
GET /api/connector/fetch-devices with X-API-Key returns monitor_type and http_port fields
POST /api/connector/device-report accepts ping_ms and http_status fields
SNMP device creation still works (backward compatibility)
Connector status endpoint returns proper structure
frontend_ui_tests: Connector IFIXITGESTSRV3 shows ONLINE badge with v1.7.1
Add Device form has Type dropdown with SNMP and Ping+HTTP options
When Ping+HTTP selected, form shows HTTP Port field instead of Community
When SNMP selected, form shows Community field
Device can be added with monitor_type=ping and http_port
Devices show SNMP or PING badge next to status
Ping devices show ping_ms (25ms) and HTTP status (200) in the row
Expanded Ping device view shows: Ping, HTTP, Stato, Monitoraggio sections

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_PingDevice_UI (192.168.99.88) during testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ping+HTTP monitoring feature fully verified. Backend endpoints support monitor_type (snmp/ping), http_port, ping_ms, http_status fields. Frontend Connettori page shows Type dropdown (SNMP/Ping+HTTP), HTTP Port field for ping devices, SNMP/PING badges, and expanded view with ping metrics. Connector IFIXITGESTSRV3 is ONLINE with v1.7.1. Update-info shows v1.7.2 available.

feature_verification.feature: Ping+HTTP Monitoring for devices without SNMP

verification_results.backend_model: ManagedDevice model has monitor_type (snmp/ping) and http_port fields - VERIFIED

verification_results.fetch_devices_endpoint: GET /api/connector/fetch-devices returns monitor_type and http_port - VERIFIED
verification_results.device_report_endpoint: POST /api/connector/device-report accepts ping_ms and http_status - VERIFIED
verification_results.poll_status_endpoint: GET /api/connector/device-poll-status returns monitor_type, ping_ms, http_status - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_type_dropdown: Add device form shows Type dropdown with SNMP and Ping+HTTP options - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_http_port_field: HTTP Port field appears when Ping+HTTP is selected - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_community_field: Community field appears when SNMP is selected - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_device_badges: Devices show SNMP or PING badge - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_ping_metrics: Ping devices show ping_ms and HTTP status in row and expanded view - VERIFIED
